name: Marsha Blackburn
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $1,430,020 for Marsha Blackburn in U.S. Senate, TN. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
